title: 3 Key Things From On Holding's Q3 2023 Earnings Call
text: On Holding's Q3 2023 earnings call revealed three key insights for investors. First, management emphasized that 2023 was the first year where On was able to show almost the full potential of gross margin, with continued improvement expected. Second, 2024 would be a year to scale existing and new audiences globally with large brand moments, with the road to the Paris Olympics offering an opportunity to connect and build credibility as an innovation-driven premium performance brand around the globe. Third, management reiterated confidence in the company's long-term growth trajectory and its ability to maintain profitability while scaling.
